_comment: Machine-readable bootstrap instructions for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex). Execute setup_steps in order to install the smcp CLI on any new host.

skill.name: skill-mcp-protocol
skill.description: Unified CLI tool for managing AI skills and MCP servers with isolated runtimes.
skill.author: newbiee2018

agent_instructions: You are an AI agent (Claude Code or Codex). This file tells you how to bootstrap the smcp CLI on this host. Execute each step in setup_steps using your shell capabilities. After completing all steps, the `smcp` command will be available in PATH and you can use it to install, manage, and remove AI skills and MCP servers.

variables.repo_dir: MUST_SET — absolute path to this repository (where skill.toml lives)

setup_steps.description: Verify Python 3.10+ is available on this host.
setup_steps.on_fail: Install Python 3.10+ via your system package manager (apt install python3, brew install python, winget install Python.Python.3) before proceeding.

setup_steps.description: Install skill-mcp-protocol using its own CLI. This copies files, creates a venv, installs deps, creates native skill entries (SKILL.md), and installs the smcp wrapper to ~/.local/bin/.
setup_steps.note: If smcp is already in PATH, you can also run: smcp install {repo_dir}

setup_steps.on_fail: Ensure ~/.local/bin is in PATH. Run: export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

teardown_steps.description: Remove skill-mcp-protocol and clean all native entries.

mcp_server_mode._comment: MCP server mode is opt-in. By default, skill-mcp-protocol is CLI-only.
